title: salix cistoides
intro: Salix cistoides, also known as rock sallow or cushion willow, is a small, shrubby willow species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Salix cistoides include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Salix cistoides is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
